charity.s: $5M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.08% of revenue).

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

wiki.extract: Academy Sports + Outdoors is an American sporting-goods store chain with corporate offices in the Katy Distribution Center in unincorporated western Harris County, Texas, United States, near Katy and west of Houston. For 74 years, it was a privately held company owned by the Gochman family, until its May 2011 acquisition by Kohlberg Kravis Roberts. In October 2020, it was listed on NASDAQ.

fflTypeNames: Dealer in Firearms Other Than Destructive Devices

topHazards.label: The recalled chairs' legs can break, posing injury and fall hazards to consumers.
The mechanical internal locking plates can fail to align and allow unauthorized users to open the gun safes, posing a serious injury hazard and risk of death.
The rear shock spring on the bicycles can become stuck, creating a pinch point between the spring and the seat, posing a risk of injury, or causing the bicycle…
The locking hardware on the front wheel can become loose resulting in front wheel instability, posing fall and injury hazards.
The turkey fryer spout can leak oil, posing a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Recalls Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chairs Due to Injury and Fall Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Academy Sports + Outdoors' Magellan-branded Odyssey Rocker Chairs with date codes 07/2025 or 08/2025 sold from September 2025 to October 2025. The recalled folding chairs were sold in charcoal, navy, olive green and teal and measure about 25.2" long by 5.5" deep by 37.4" high when folded or 25.4" …
hazards: The recalled chairs' legs can break, posing injury and fall hazards to consumers.
injuries: Academy Sports + Outdoors has received one report of the chair's legs breaking. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Recalls Redfield 12- and 18-Gun Fireproof Safes Due to Serious Injury Hazard and Risk of Death
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Academy Sports + Outdoors Redfield 12-Gun and 18-Gun Fireproof Safes. The 12-Gun Fireproof Safe has the model number 179498 and 18-Gun Fireproof Safe has the model number 179499. "Redfield" is printed on the front door above the number pad. The model name and serial number are located on a red lab…
hazards: The mechanical internal locking plates can fail to align and allow unauthorized users to open the gun safes, posing a serious injury hazard and risk of death.

sampleRecalls.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Recalls Ozone 500 Girls' and Boys' Elevate 24-Inch Bicycles Due to Fall and Injury Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Ozone 500 Girls' and Boys' Elevate 24-Inch Bicycles. "Ozone 500" is printed on the frame. The girls' bicycle frame is fuchsia with black script and the boys' bicycle frame is black with red script. The following style numbers can be found on the seat tube. Style Number Description 164538 Ozone…
hazards: The rear shock spring on the bicycles can become stuck, creating a pinch point between the spring and the seat, posing a risk of injury, or causing the bicycle…
injuries: Academy has received one report of a person injuring their hand under the seat when the rear shock spring compressed.
products: Ozone 500® Girls' and Boys' Elevate 24-Inch Bicycles

sampleRecalls.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Recalls Ozone 500 Density Bicycles Due to Fall and Injury Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Ozone 500 Density series bicycles. The model number can be found on the seat tube. "Ozone 500" is printed on the frame. The bicycles were sold in multiple colors. Model Number Description 164539 Ozone 500® Boys' Density 24 in Bicycle 162803 Ozone 500® Women's Density 26 in 18-Speed Bicycle 164537 …
hazards: The locking hardware on the front wheel can become loose resulting in front wheel instability, posing fall and injury hazards.

sampleRecalls.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Recalls Turkey Fryer Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Academy Sports + Outdoors Outdoor Gourmet Turkey Keg which is a turkey fryer made of stainless steel and powered by propane. The fryer, including the legs, measures 34 inches high by 17 inches wide. The item number is 157826 and is located on a label on one of the four legs.
hazards: The turkey fryer spout can leak oil, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: Academy Sports + Outdoors has received two reports of a Turkey Keg leaking. No injuries or property damage have been reported.
products: Outdoor Gourmet Turkey Keg turkey fryers

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was moving merchandise using a forklift. The employee's leg became caught between the forklift and a metal beam; the leg and foot were broken.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was testing a bike. As he got off it, his leg became stuck; this caused him to fall and suffer a broken right ankle. He was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping over an object
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was taking a package to the loading dock when he tripped over a large plastic tray that was on the floor near the loading dock door. He fell on the floor and sustained a fractured right forearm.

An employee was working as a store greeter when a suspected shoplifter assaulted them with a pool cue. The employee was hospitalized for a collarbone fracture, broken dentures, and an injury that required approximately 10 stitches.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was stocking dog beds when he fell from the second step of a step ladder to the floor. The employee sustained contusions and a strain to the lower back and chest wall.
